title: MPESB – Hospital Assistant – 1200 Posts

basic_details.job_title: MPESB Hospital Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 1200 Posts
basic_details.short_information: MPESB Recruitment 2026 offers 1200 new vacancies for Hospital Assistant posts. Eligible candidates with 10th Pass can apply online from 07-05-2026 to 23-05-2026 (Extended) through the official MPESB website, esb.mp.gov.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Directorate of Public Health and Medical Education, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, Bhopal
basic_details.post_name: Hospital Assistant / Aspatal Sahayak (Non-Executive, Fourth Grade)
basic_details.application_mode: Online only (via MP Online Portal - www.mponline.gov.in)

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum High School / Class 10th Pass is mandatory.

selection_process: Online Written Examination (Objective MCQ type, 100 Questions, 100 Marks, 2 Hours)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the MP Online Portal at www.mponline.gov.in. No offline applications will be accepted. The online portal will be active from 07-05-2026 to 23-05-2026 (by 12:00 midnight). Candidates can apply either through self-login (using Credit/Debit Card or Net Banking for fee payment) or through authorized MP Online Kiosks (additional portal charge applicable).
seo_tags: Madhya Pradesh Employees Selection Board Hospital Assistant Recruitment 2026
